name: Elysia Thornshadow
sd_appearance: Half-elf Sergeant Elysia Thornshadow, standing tall at a height slightly surpassing humans, with raven-black hair cascading down her back, piercing emerald eyes, and a prominent scar running down her left cheek, dons a utilitarian-military outfit of ash grey chainmail. Her Warden badge, a symbol of her faction, is pinned prominently on her chest. A spear, crossbow, and handaxe are visible on her person, ready for action. Her left cheek bears the distinctive ash-mark, a symbol of her high rank within the Wardens of Ash.
faction_visual: ash grey chainmail or plate, Warden badge, ash-mark on left cheek if officer
style_note: utilitarian-military — built to survive, nothing wasted
